title: euodia lydgatei
intro: Euodia lydgatei, also known as Chinese evodia or Wu Zhu Yu, is a plant species native to China, belonging to the Rutaceae family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including relieving pain, reducing fever, and treating digestive issues, as well as its ability to improve circulation and lower blood pressure. Herbal preparations of Euodia lydgatei include teas, extracts, and tinctures, which are often used in combination with other herbs to treat a range of health conditions.
